purpose: Master AI tool registry integrated into CatalystOS. 60 tools across 9 categories with Catalyst specific priority tiers and revenue stream mappings.

priority_tiers.DEPLOY_NOW: Immediate operational value. Use this quarter.
priority_tiers.Q3_EXPANSION: Activate when scaling Phase 1 team and Sneakers Fest production.
priority_tiers.LEARN: Reference and education layer. Read or skim, do not deploy yet.
priority_tiers.SKIP: Not relevant to Lagos consulting ops or current scope.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: Anthropic's command line coding agent. Reads files, writes code, runs tests, operates directly in your local environment.
tools.use_case: Backbone of CatalystOS development. Already integrated.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: AI first code editor built on VS Code. Inline completions, chat with your codebase, multi file editing.
tools.use_case: Primary IDE for AI Tech VA when hired.

tools.name: Codex CLI
tools.description: OpenAI's terminal coding agent. Takes natural language instructions, reads your codebase, writes and executes code.
tools.use_case: Alternative to Claude Code. Test for comparison only.

tools.name: Windsurf
tools.description: AI coding IDE by Codeium. Cascade agent for multi file editing, deep codebase understanding, flow state coding.
tools.use_case: Watch list. Free tier may serve AI Tech VA.

tools.name: Superpowers
tools.description: 20+ battle tested Claude Code skills. TDD, debugging, plan to execute pipelines. 96,000+ stars on GitHub.
tools.use_case: Install into existing 17 SKILL.md package layer immediately.

tools.name: Spec Kit
tools.description: Spec driven development. Write specifications, AI generates code from them. 50,000+ stars.
tools.use_case: Onboard for Chambers AI Blueprint Phase 2 spec work.

tools.name: Aider
tools.description: AI pair programming in your terminal. Works with any LLM. Strong at working with existing codebases.
tools.use_case: Reference for terminal native pair coding patterns.

tools.name: OpenClaw
tools.description: Viral open source AI agent. Persistent, multi channel, self learning. 210K+ stars.
tools.use_case: Power Social VA's autonomous comment and DM responses.

tools.name: LangGraph
tools.description: Multi agent orchestration as code. Build agents as graphs with branching logic, human in the loop, persistent state.
tools.use_case: Backbone for Chambers AI Phase 2 multi step legal workflows.

tools.name: CrewAI
tools.description: Multi agent framework with roles, goals, and backstories. Each agent has a defined persona and responsibility.
tools.use_case: Model Sneakers Fest production crew as agents. Map Shelby Reddington Scofield personas.

tools.name: AutoGPT
tools.description: Full autonomous agent platform for long running tasks. The OG agent framework. Matured significantly.
tools.use_case: Historical reference. Newer frameworks more relevant.

tools.name: Dify
tools.description: Open source LLM app builder. Combines workflows, RAG, agents, and model management in one platform.
tools.use_case: Onboard Social VA and Events Coordinator without code.

tools.name: OWL
tools.description: Multi agent cooperation framework. Tops the GAIA benchmark for agent coordination.
tools.use_case: Cutting edge research. Test once CatalystOS Phase 2 stabilizes.

tools.name: CopilotKit
tools.description: Embed AI copilots directly into React applications. Ship AI features in your product, not just your workflow.
tools.use_case: Embed Claude into Sneakers Fest online platform and Za.allyErrands.

tools.name: pydantic-ai
tools.description: Type safe agent framework built on Pydantic. For Python developers who want structured, validated agent outputs.
tools.use_case: Already integrated with FastAPI backend. Standardize agent outputs across CatalystOS.

tools.name: Tavily
tools.description: Search engine built for AI agents. Clean, structured, LLM ready data. Four tools: search, extract, crawl, map.
tools.use_case: Power Research Scout. Replace generic web search.

tools.name: Context7
tools.description: Injects up to date library documentation into your LLM's context. No more hallucinated APIs or deprecated methods.
tools.use_case: Install on dev workstation. Critical for FastAPI backend work.

tools.name: Task Master AI
tools.description: Your AI's project manager. Feed it a PRD and it generates structured tasks with dependencies.
tools.use_case: Run Sneakers Fest production timeline. Drive Great Sabotage Part 10-12 pipeline.

tools.name: MCP Playwright
tools.description: Browser automation for LLMs. Control a real browser through natural language. Testing, scraping, interaction.
tools.use_case: Already in UGC video automation. Expand to Vice Chairman engagement monitoring.

tools.name: fastmcp
tools.description: Build MCP servers in minimal Python. The fastest way to create custom tool integrations.
tools.use_case: Build custom MCP servers for Chambers, Sneakers Fest, Aso Oke client workflows.

tools.name: markdownify-mcp
tools.description: Convert PDFs, images, and audio into Markdown. Feed any document type into your AI workflow.
tools.use_case: Critical for voice note to content package pipeline.

tools.name: MCPHub
tools.description: Manage multiple MCP servers via HTTP. One dashboard for all your tool connections.
tools.use_case: Consolidate MCP connections once 5+ servers active.

tools.name: PDF Processing
tools.description: Official Anthropic skill. Read, extract tables, fill forms, merge and split PDFs.
tools.use_case: Chambers affidavit and pleadings processing. Already in active use.

tools.name: Frontend Design
tools.description: Official Anthropic skill. Build real design systems, bold typography, production grade UI.
tools.use_case: Already running. Lagos Noir aesthetic execution layer.

tools.name: Skill Creator
tools.description: The meta skill. Describe a workflow in plain English, get a complete SKILL.md back in five minutes.
tools.use_case: Build new skills for each Phase 1 hire role.

tools.name: Marketing Skills
tools.description: By Corey Haines. 20+ skills covering CRO, copywriting, SEO, email sequences, growth strategy.
tools.use_case: Direct fit for Vice Chairman SMM ops and Sneakers Fest marketing.

tools.name: Claude SEO
tools.description: Full site audits, schema validation, keyword analysis. 12 sub skills covering complete SEO workflow.
tools.use_case: Onboard for Substack ranking and Sneakers Fest online discovery.

tools.name: Obsidian Skills
tools.description: Built by Obsidian's CEO. Auto tagging, auto linking, vault native operations.
tools.use_case: Pair with existing Claude Obsidian full stack knowledge system.

tools.name: Context Optimization
tools.description: Reduce token costs and improve KV cache efficiency. Makes expensive API workflows significantly cheaper.
tools.use_case: Cut Anthropic API costs as Chambers usage scales.

tools.name: Deep Research Skill
tools.description: 8 phase research with auto continuation. For when you need Claude to go deep on a topic.
tools.use_case: Power The Great Sabotage research and Dark Matter manuscript depth.

tools.name: Ollama
tools.description: Run open source LLMs locally with one terminal command. Supports Llama, Mistral, Gemma, and dozens more.
tools.use_case: Local LLM for client privacy work and offline ops in Lagos.

tools.name: Open WebUI
tools.description: Self hosted ChatGPT like interface. Pairs perfectly with Ollama for a private AI setup.
tools.use_case: Onboard team members with private AI without exposing API keys.

tools.name: LlamaFile
tools.description: Package an entire LLM as a single executable file. Zero dependencies. Download and run.
tools.use_case: Edge case for offline demos.

tools.name: Unsloth
tools.description: Fine tune models 2x faster with 70% less memory.
tools.use_case: GPU intensive. Out of scope for Lagos consulting ops.

tools.name: vLLM
tools.description: High throughput inference engine. 2 to 4x faster than naive serving.
tools.use_case: Production GPU serving. Not relevant at current scale.

tools.name: n8n
tools.description: Open source workflow automation with 400+ integrations and AI nodes. Self hostable.
tools.use_case: Run Vice Chairman content calendar automation. Sneakers Fest ticket workflows.

tools.name: Langflow
tools.description: Visual drag and drop for agent pipelines. 140,000+ stars.
tools.use_case: Train team on agent design visually before coding handoff.

tools.name: Huginn
tools.description: Self hosted web agents for monitoring, alerts, and data collection. Privacy first.
tools.use_case: Older tech. n8n usually wins.

tools.name: DSPy
tools.description: Program (not prompt) foundation models. Stanford research framework.
tools.use_case: Advanced. Revisit when standardizing prompts across 10+ workflows.

tools.name: Temporal
tools.description: Durable workflow engine for long running processes. Survives crashes, retries, timeouts.
tools.use_case: Sneakers Fest ticket sales, payment processing, multi day workflows.

tools.name: GPT Researcher
tools.description: Autonomous research agent that produces compiled reports. Give it a topic, get back analysis with sources.
tools.use_case: Pair with existing research scout. Power Substack deep dives.

tools.name: Firecrawl
tools.description: Turn any website into LLM ready data. Web scraping designed specifically for AI pipelines.
tools.use_case: Competitor and client research at scale.

tools.name: Vanna AI
tools.description: Natural language to SQL. Ask questions in English, get database queries back.
tools.use_case: Sneakers Fest analytics dashboard once attendee DB exists.

tools.name: Instructor
tools.description: Get structured JSON outputs from any LLM using Pydantic models. Works with 15+ providers.
tools.use_case: Standardize structured outputs across all CatalystOS agents.

tools.name: Chroma
tools.description: Open source vector database. Simplest way to add semantic search and long term memory.
tools.use_case: Already in media memory system. Expand to Chambers knowledge base.

tools.name: dlt
tools.description: LLM native data pipelines from 5,000+ sources. Get data from anywhere into your AI workflow.
tools.use_case: Ingest client data into Chambers knowledge graph.

tools.name: ExtractThinker
tools.description: ORM for document intelligence. Extract structured data from any document type.
tools.use_case: Pair with markdownify and PDF Processing for full document pipeline.

tools.name: FastAPI
tools.description: The Python web framework for serving AI applications. Exceptional documentation. Pydantic validation built in.
tools.use_case: Already the CatalystOS backbone. Stay deep.

tools.name: Portkey Gateway
tools.description: Route requests to 250+ LLMs through one API. Switch models without changing code.
tools.use_case: Add when juggling Claude, Gemini, and local models for cost optimization.

tools.name: OmniRoute
tools.description: API proxy for 44+ AI providers. Load balancing, fallbacks, and cost optimization.
tools.use_case: Alternative to Portkey. Pick one.

tools.name: lmnr
tools.description: Trace and evaluate agent behavior. See exactly what your agents are doing.
tools.use_case: Critical observability layer once 5+ production agents running.

tools.name: Codebase Memory MCP
tools.description: Convert your codebase into a persistent knowledge graph. Claude remembers your entire project structure across sessions.
tools.use_case: Critical for CatalystOS multi session continuity.

tools.name: Awesome Claude Skills
tools.description: The best curated skill list. 22,000+ stars. Start here when looking for new skills to install.
tools.use_case: Weekly scan for new skills to add to CatalystOS layer.

tools.name: Anthropic Skills Repo
tools.description: Official reference implementations from Anthropic. The gold standard for how skills should be built.
tools.use_case: Reference when authoring new SKILL.md packages.

tools.name: Awesome Agents
tools.description: 100+ open source agent tools in one curated list.
tools.use_case: Browse quarterly for new agent frameworks worth testing.

tools.name: PromptingGuide
tools.description: Comprehensive prompt engineering reference covering every technique from basics to advanced agent prompting.
tools.use_case: Reference for AI Tech VA onboarding curriculum.

tools.name: Anthropic Prompt Eng. Tutorial
tools.description: 9 chapters of hands on exercises with Jupyter notebooks. The best structured way to learn prompting.
tools.use_case: Mandatory for AI Tech VA onboarding.

tools.name: SkillsMP
tools.description: Marketplace with 80,000+ community skills. The largest catalog for discovering Claude skills.
tools.use_case: Search before building custom skills.

tools.name: MAGI//ARCHIVE
tools.description: Daily feed of fresh AI repos. Stay on top of what is shipping.
tools.use_case: Weekly skim. Bookmark anything that matches an active CatalystOS gap.

tools.name: Anthropic Official Docs
tools.description: Covers the API, prompting best practices, tool use, agents, and everything else.
tools.use_case: Daily reference. Bookmark in toolbar.
